goal.name: shade
goal.description: Packages the project and its dependencies into a single uber-JAR, applying relocations, resource transformers, and class filters.

parameter.name: artifactSet
parameter.description: Selects which dependency artifacts to include or exclude in the shaded JAR using composite identifiers (groupId:artifactId:type:classifier) with wildcard support.

parameter.name: filters
parameter.description: Per-artifact file-level inclusion/exclusion filters. Each entry specifies an artifact coordinate and Ant-style patterns for the class/resource files to keep or drop from that artifact.

parameter.name: shadedGroupFilter
parameter.description: Include only dependency artifacts whose groupId starts with this prefix.

parameter.name: extraArtifacts
parameter.description: Additional artifacts (in groupId:artifactId:version[:type[:classifier]] format) to include in the shaded JAR beyond the regular project dependencies.

parameter.name: extraJars
parameter.description: Explicit JAR files (by path) to include in the shaded JAR in addition to resolved dependencies.

parameter.name: relocations
parameter.description: List of package relocation rules that rename Java packages in the shaded JAR to avoid classpath conflicts (e.g. move com.google.guava to shaded.guava).

parameter.name: transformers
parameter.description: List of resource transformer implementations that merge or replace resources from multiple JARs (e.g. ManifestResourceTransformer, ServicesResourceTransformer, AppendingTransformer).

parameter.name: minimizeJar
parameter.description: Remove classes not reachable from the project's own classes via transitive dependency analysis. Default: false

parameter.name: entryPoints
parameter.description: Explicit entry-point class names used to seed the reachability analysis when minimizeJar=true, ensuring those classes and their transitive dependencies are kept.

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory where the shaded JAR is written. Default: ${project.build.directory}

parameter.name: outputFile
parameter.description: Explicit output file path for the shaded JAR (overrides outputDirectory and finalName when set).

parameter.name: finalName
parameter.description: Override the base name of the shaded artifact (without classifier or extension).

parameter.name: shadedArtifactId
parameter.description: Custom artifactId for the shaded JAR artifact. Default: ${project.artifactId}

parameter.name: shadedArtifactAttached
parameter.description: When true, attach the shaded JAR as a secondary artifact (using the classifier) and keep the original JAR as the primary artifact. When false, replace the primary artifact. Default: false

parameter.name: shadedClassifierName
parameter.description: Classifier used when shadedArtifactAttached=true. Default: shaded

parameter.name: createSourcesJar
parameter.description: Create a sources JAR alongside the shaded JAR containing the aggregated source files. Default: false

parameter.name: shadeSourcesContent
parameter.description: Apply package relocations to the content of Java source files in the sources JAR (heuristic text replacement). Default: false. User property: shadeSourcesContent

parameter.name: createTestSourcesJar
parameter.description: Create a test-sources JAR alongside the shaded JAR. Default: false

parameter.name: shadeTestJar
parameter.description: Create a shaded test-jar artifact. Default: false

parameter.name: createDependencyReducedPom
parameter.description: Generate a dependency-reduced POM that omits the shaded dependencies. Default: true

parameter.name: dependencyReducedPomLocation
parameter.description: Output path for the dependency-reduced POM. Default: ${basedir}/dependency-reduced-pom.xml

parameter.name: generateUniqueDependencyReducedPom
parameter.description: Write the dependency-reduced POM to a uniquely named temp file to support parallel multi-module builds. Default: false

parameter.name: useDependencyReducedPomInJar
parameter.description: Bundle the dependency-reduced POM inside the shaded JAR instead of the original POM. Default: false

parameter.name: keepDependenciesWithProvidedScope
parameter.description: Keep provided-scope dependencies in the dependency-reduced POM rather than removing them. Default: false

parameter.name: promoteTransitiveDependencies
parameter.description: Promote transitive dependencies of shaded artifacts to direct dependencies in the dependency-reduced POM. Default: false

parameter.name: useBaseVersion
parameter.description: Use base version (e.g. 2.7-SNAPSHOT) instead of resolved unique version in the dependency-reduced POM. Default: false

parameter.name: outputTimestamp
parameter.description: Timestamp for reproducible archive entries (ISO 8601 date-time or seconds since epoch). User property: project.build.outputTimestamp. Default: ${project.build.outputTimestamp}

parameter.name: skip
parameter.description: Skip execution of the shade goal entirely. Default: false

goal.name: help
goal.description: Displays help information on available goals and parameters.

parameter.name: detail
parameter.description: Show parameter details for the specified goal. Default: false

parameter.name: goal
parameter.description: Name of the goal for which to show detailed help.

parameter.name: lineLength
parameter.description: Maximum line length for help output. Default: 80

parameter.name: indentSize
parameter.description: Number of spaces per indentation level in help output. Default: 2
